endpoints.description: Returns the current leave balance for an employee - id (path, required): Employee ID (e.g., E101, E102) Response: { employee_id, total_leaves, used_leaves, remaining_leaves }

Submit a new leave request - id (path, required): Employee ID - start_date (body, required): Leave start date (YYYY-MM-DD) - end_date (body, required): Leave end date (YYYY-MM-DD) - reason (body, optional): Reason for leave Response: { request_id, status, message }
Get payroll information for an employee - id (path, required): Employee ID Response: { employee_id, salary, bonus, deductions, net_pay }

Returns the current leave balance for an employee. - id (path, required): string - Employee ID (e.g., E101, E102) Response: Returns leave balance in days

Submit a new leave request for an employee. - id (path, required): string - Employee ID - leave_type: string (annual, sick, personal) - start_date: string (YYYY-MM-DD) - end_date: string (YYYY-MM-DD) - reason: string Response: Returns request ID and status
Get payroll information for an employee. - id (path, required): string - Employee ID Response: Returns salary, deductions, and payment status

Create a new HR support ticket. - employee_id: string - category: string (benefits, payroll, leave, other) - subject: string - description: string - priority: string (low, medium, high) Response: Returns ticket ID and status ```

Register a new IoT device. - device_id: string - Unique device identifier - device_type: string - Type of device (sensor, actuator, gateway) - location: string - Physical location - metadata: object - Additional device information Response: Returns device registration confirmation
Get device information. - device_id (path, required): string - Device ID Response: Returns device details and status Device Control
Send command to device. - device_id (path, required): string - Device ID - command: string - Command to execute - parameters: object - Command parameters Response: Returns command execution status
Get current device status. - device_id (path, required): string - Device ID Response: Returns device status (online, offline, error) Data Collection

Get sensor data from device. - device_id (path, required): string - Device ID - start_time (query, optional): string - Start timestamp - end_time (query, optional): string - End timestamp - metric (query, optional): string - Specific metric to retrieve Response: Returns array of sensor readings
Upload sensor data. - device_id (path, required): string - Device ID - timestamp: string - Reading timestamp - metrics: object - Sensor readings Response: Returns data upload confirmation
Returns the current leave balance for an employee - id (path, required): Employee ID (e.g., E101, E102) Response: { employee_id, total_leaves, used_leaves, remaining_leaves }

Submit a new leave request - id (path, required): Employee ID - start_date (body, required): Leave start date (YYYY-MM-DD) - end_date (body, required): Leave end date (YYYY-MM-DD) - reason (body, optional): Reason for leave Response: { request_id, status, message }
Get payroll information for an employee - id (path, required): Employee ID Response: { employee_id, salary, bonus, deductions, net_pay }

Create a new HR support ticket - employee_id (body, required): Employee ID - category (body, required): Ticket category - description (body, required): Issue description Response: { ticket_id, status, created_at }

Creates a new user account. Request body: { "name": "Maya Chen", "email": "maya@example.com", "password": "StrongPass123!", "company_name": "Northwind Labs" } Response: { "success": true, "data": { "user_id": "usr_01HZX9", "email": "maya@example.com", "name": "Maya Chen", "company_id": "org_01HZX1" } }

Authenticates a user and returns access tokens. Request body: { "email": "maya@example.com", "password": "StrongPass123!" } Response: { "success": true, "data": { "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...", "refresh_token": "rft_01HZX9...", "expires_in": 3600 } }
Refreshes an access token. Request body: { "refresh_token": "rft_01HZX9..." }
Returns the current authenticated user. Users Endpoints
Lists users in the current organization. Query parameters: page, limit, search, role, status
Creates a new user. Request body: { "name": "Ari Patel", "email": "ari@example.com", "role": "manager", "department": "operations" }
Sends a password reset link. Organizations Endpoints
Lists organizations visible to the current user.
Creates a new organization. Request body: { "name": "Northwind Labs", "industry": "software", "plan": "enterprise" }
Adds a member to the organization. Request body: { "user_id": "usr_01HZX9", "role": "admin" }
Removes a member from the organization. Projects Endpoints
Lists projects. Query parameters: page, limit, search, status, owner_id
Creates a project. Request body: { "name": "Customer Portal Revamp", "description": "Modernize the customer portal UX", "owner_id": "usr_01HZX9", "priority": "high" }
Adds a project member. Request body: { "user_id": "usr_02ABCD", "role": "editor" }
Removes a project member. Tasks Endpoints
Lists tasks for a project. Query parameters: page, limit, status, assignee_id, priority
Creates a task. Request body: { "title": "Design login flow", "description": "Create wireframes and review states", "assignee_id": "usr_01HZX9", "priority": "medium", "due_date": "2026-05-12" }
Adds a comment to a task. Request body: { "body": "This is ready for review." }
Lists uploaded files for a project.
Uploads a new file. Request: multipart/form-data Fields: file, filename, category
Renames a file. Request body: { "filename": "spec-v2.pdf" } Billing Endpoints
Adds a payment method. Request body: { "type": "card", "token": "tok_visa_123" }
Removes a payment method. Notifications Endpoints
Lists notifications. Query parameters: page, limit, unread_only
Sends a test notification to the current user. Audit Logs Endpoints
Lists audit log entries. Query parameters: page, limit, actor_id, action, resource_type, date_from, date_to
Returns a single audit entry. Analytics Endpoints
Returns high-level platform metrics. Response: { "success": true, "data": { "active_users": 1842, "projects_created_30d": 126, "tasks_completed_30d": 948, "revenue_mrr": 48200 } }
Searches across users, projects, tasks, files, and notifications. Query parameters: q, type, page, limit Webhooks Endpoints

Creates a webhook subscription. Request body: { "name": "task-updates", "url": "https://example.com/webhooks/task-updates", "events": ["task.created", "task.updated", "task.deleted"], "secret": "whsec_123" }
Sends a test event. Webhook Events task.created task.updated task.deleted project.created project.updated user.invited invoice.paid invoice.failed Integrations Endpoints
Connects a new integration. Request body: { "provider": "slack", "settings": { "workspace": "northwind" } }
Triggers a manual sync. Reports Endpoints
Creates a report. Request body: { "name": "Monthly Operations Report", "type": "pdf", "filters": { "project_id": "prj_01HZX9" } }
Deletes a report. Rate-Limited Admin Endpoints
Suspends an organization. Request body: { "reason": "Policy violation" }

Restores a suspended organization. Object Schemas User { "id": "usr_01HZX9", "name": "Maya Chen", "email": "maya@example.com", "role": "admin", "status": "active", "created_at": "2026-05-03T10:15:30Z" } Project { "id": "prj_01HZX9", "name": "Customer Portal Revamp", "description": "Modernize the customer portal UX", "status": "in_progress", "priority": "high", "owner_id": "usr_01HZX9" } Task { "id": "tsk_01HZX9", "title": "Design login flow", "description": "Create wireframes and review states", "status": "todo", "priority": "medium", "assignee_id": "usr_02ABCD" } Standard HTTP Status Codes 200 OK 201 Created 204 No Content 400 Bad Request 401 Unauthorized 403 Forbidden 404 Not Found 409 Conflict 422 Validation Error 429 Too Many Requests 500 Internal Server Error Example End-to-End Flow 1. Register or log in. 2. Create an organization. 3. Add members. 4. Create a project. 5. Add tasks and files. 6. Review analytics and audit logs. 7. Export reports. 8. Connect webhooks and integrations. Example cURL curl -X GET https://api.atlasops.example.com/v1/projects \ -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \ -H "Accept: application/json" curl -X POST https://api.atlasops.example.com/v1/projects \ -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "name": "Customer Portal Revamp", "description": "Modernize the customer portal UX", "owner_id": "usr_01HZX9", "priority": "high" }' curl -X POST https://api.atlasops.example.com/v1/projects/prj_01HZX9/tasks \ -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "title": "Design login flow", "description": "Create wireframes and review states", "assignee_id": "usr_02ABCD", "priority": "medium", "due_date": "2026-05-12" }'
